name: io.github.charistas/posokanei-mcp
description: Unofficial read-only MCP server for Greek supermarket price data from PosoKanei.

environmentVariables.name: POSOKANEI_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Optional PosoKanei API base URL override.

environmentVariables.name: POSOKANEI_MIN_INTERVAL_MS
environmentVariables.description: Optional minimum delay between outbound PosoKanei API requests.

environmentVariables.name: POSOKANEI_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Optional outbound request timeout in milliseconds.
